instruction: Write a FreeMarker recursive macro `renderCommentTree` that renders nested comments from maps with `author`, `body`, and optional `replies` sequence. Indent nested replies in a nested ul. Escape author and body text.
code:
<#-- Model: comments: sequence of maps { author, body, replies? } --> <#macro renderCommentTree comments>
    <#list comments![] as comment>

  • ${comment.author?html}: ${comment.body?html}

    <#if comment.replies?has_content> <@renderCommentTree comments=comment.replies />
